title: elaphoglossum herrerae
intro: Elaphoglossum herrerae is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Costa Rica. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Elaphoglossum herrerae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum herrerae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
